title: Column alias might fail in the ORDER BY's subquery clause.
bug_features_seed: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1, t2;
CREATE TABLE t1 (a INTEGER, b TEXT, c REAL, d DATE);
CREATE TABLE t2 (a INTEGER, b INTEGER NOT NULL, c TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
SELECT one.a, one.b AS b2 FROM t1 one ORDER BY (SELECT two.b FROM t2 two WHERE two.a = CAST(one.b AS INTEGER));
key_bug_features: Column alias in ORDER BY subquery clause fails
